title: Tax return forms and instructions
text:
Tax return forms and instructions

On this page you will find income tax return forms for resident natural persons and tax return forms for non-resident natural and legal persons, as well as instructions for completing them.

On this page you will find

Tax return forms for resident natural persons Tax return forms for non-resident natural and legal persons The tax returns of 2019–2024

It is most convenient to submit the income tax return in the e-services environment e-MTA.

About declaration of income 

Help information for completing a tax return

Tax return forms for resident natural persons

Form A | 346.4 KB | pdf

Income tax return of a resident natural person

Form E | 410.95 KB | pdf

Business income of a resident natural person

Tax return forms for non-resident natural and legal persons

Form A1 | 1.39 MB | pdf

Income tax return on income of non-resident and investment fund derived on which no income tax has been withheld (fillable)

Form E1 | 378.5 KB | pdf

Income tax return on business income of non-resident derived in Estonia

Form E1 | 103.27 KB | docx

Form V1 | 374.87 KB | pdf

Income tax return on gain derived by non-resident and investment fund from transfer of property in Estonia (fillable)

Instructions for completing form V1 | 211.7 KB | pdf
